title: Relaxed Indonesian Comfort
subtitle: THE ACCOMMODATIONS
text_content: With 110 rooms arranged across six floors, Sukajadi Hotel offers a warm and welcoming stay inspired by traditional Indonesian charm. From cozy Classic Rooms to spacious multi‑bed Family Suites, each room provides a relaxed, comfortable environment complete with air‑conditioning and essential amenities. Ample on‑site parking adds extra convenience for travellers exploring Bandung and its northern attractions.

title: A Peaceful Escape in the Heart of Sukajadi
subtitle: LEISURE & CALM
text_content: Step inside our quiet courtyard pool area and leave the city’s bustle behind. With cozy gazebos, open‑air seating, and a refreshing atmosphere, it’s a serene spot to unwind, enjoy your favourite local dishes, and relax at your own pace.
